title: Cinch's Abandoned Houses
description: Abandoned houses with starter loot can randomly be found around the world.
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/FdMq04w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1088)

This simple mod adds abandoned houses that you can find around the world. These houses come in varying states of destruction and can contain basic starter loot.

There are many more house variants for more biomes coming soon.

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks!
